title: Deflecto Pk 5 x A5 Snap Frame Silver - Aluminium Clip Frames - Wall Mount Picture Frames - Posters Display Holder - Front Opening Picture Frame Clips
features: Deflecto Pk 5 x A5 Snap Frame Silver - Aluminium Clip Frames - Wall Mount Picture Frames - Posters Display Holder - Front Opening Picture Frame Clips
description: Product Description About Us Deflecto provides products that make life more efficient and safer at home, at work, and on the road. Innovation is at the core of our work, which is why we never stop looking for better ways to support, organize, and protect what’s important to you. Our customers trust us to come up with sustainable and safe new ways to protect them and what they value and put everything they need in place and within reach so they can focus on what they do best. A longtime leader in office, safety, personal safety, and air distribution innovation, Deflecto is known for looking at ideas from every angle to uncover even better solutions. Sixty years into our story, we continue to invent and improve our products with your needs in mind. We believe creativity and innovation make the world a better place, so we devote our time and our talent to supporting yours. STYLISH DESIGN Deflecto snap frames are stylish and durable, designed with a 25mm profile, giving them a slim and modern appearance, perfect for the home, office environment or commercial space. Made from high-quality aluminium. Finished in Silver anodised aluminium they are built to withstand the test of time and provide long-lasting performance. EASE OF USE The snap frame mechanism allows for quick and effortless poster or photo changes, making it easy to update your displays whenever needed. Simply snap open, insert your poster, and snap shut - no tools or technical expertise required. EASY INSTALLATION Installation is a breeze with the included mounting hardware, allowing you to easily mount these frames on walls, doors, windows, or any other desired surface. The lightweight construction makes them easy to handle and transport.
